data.title_en: Invocations for when you meet an adversary or a powerful ruler.

items.chapter_title_en: Invocations for when you meet an adversary or a powerful ruler.
items.arabic_text: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَجْعَلُكَ فِي نُحُورِهِم، وَنَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شُرُورِهِمْ)).
items.english_text: (O Allah, we place You before them and we take refuge in You from their evil.)
items.transliteration: (Allahumma inna najAAaluka fee nuhoorihim wanaAAoothu bika min shuroorihim.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Allahumma inna najAAaluka fee nuhoorihim wanaAAoothu bika min shuroorihim.)

items.chapter_title_en: Invocations for when you meet an adversary or a powerful ruler.
items.arabic_text: ((اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ عَضُدِي، وَأَنْتَ نَصِيرِي، بِكَ أَحُولُ وَبِكَ أَصُولُ، وَبِكَ أُقاتِلُ)).
items.english_text: (O Allah, You are my supporter and You are my helper, by You I move and by You I attack and by You I battle.)
items.transliteration: (Allahumma anta AAadudee, wa-anta naseeree, bika ajoolu wabika asoolu wabika oqatil)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Allahumma anta AAadudee, wa-anta naseeree, bika ajoolu wabika asoolu wabika oqatil)

items.chapter_title_en: Invocations for when you meet an adversary or a powerful ruler.
items.english_text: (Allah is sufficient for us, and how fine a trustee (He is).)
